subject: Physics
title: Quantum Teleportation
description: Learn Quantum Teleportation in one minute.

hook.text: Scientists teleported the quantum state of a particle across 1,400 kilometers using a satellite.

buildup.text: Quantum teleportation transfers a particle's exact state to another particle—destroying the original.

discovery.text: It works using entanglement plus a classical message. No matter or energy actually travels.

twist.text: You can't teleport people. And it can't send information faster than light—a classical signal is needed.

climax.text: China's Micius satellite demonstrated teleportation from space to ground in 2017.

punchline.text: Teleportation is real. Just not the kind from science fiction.

quiz.question: What does quantum teleportation actually transfer?
options: The quantum state of a particle, not the particle itself
Physical matter from one place to another
